steps.title: Find the main verb
steps.content: After the semicolon, the second independent clause has the subject this function. The blank must provide a finite verb that agrees with that singular subject and completes the clause.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice A is a present participle, Choice B is a participial phrase, and Choice D is an infinitive. None can serve as the main verb of an independent clause.

steps.title: Use singular present tense
steps.content: Choice C gives the finite third-person singular verb stems, which agrees with this function and completes the independent clause after the semicolon. The answer is C.
